song.title: Be Still, for the Presence of the Lord
song.author: David Evans
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C V5 C
song.lyrics: [V1] .D F#m7 Bm Be still, for the presence of the Lord, . Em7 A The Holy One, is here. .D F#m7 Bm Come, bow before Him now, . Em7 A With reverence and fear. [C] .G A D In Him no sin is found. .G A D We stand on holy ground. .G A F#m7 Bm Be still, for the presence of the Lord, . Em7 A D The Holy One is here. [V2] Be still, for the glory of the Lord Is shining all around. He burns with holy fire, With splendor He is crowned. [V3] How awesome is the sight, Our radiant King of Light! Be still, for the glory of the Lord Is shining all around. [V4] Be still, for the power of the Lord, Is moving in this place. He comes to cleanse and heal, To minister His grace. [V5] No work too hard for Him. In faith receive from Him. Be still, for the power of the Lord, Is moving in this place.
